scripts.dev:web: npm run build --workspace @semse/shared && npm run build --workspace @semse/auth && npm run build --workspace @semse/schemas && npm run build --workspace @semse/knowledge && npm run build --workspace @semse/agents && npm run build --workspace @semse/autonomy && npm run build --workspace @semse/tools && npm run dev --workspace @semse/web
scripts.dev:api: npm run build --workspace @semse/shared && npm run build --workspace @semse/auth && npm run build --workspace @semse/schemas && npm run build --workspace @semse/knowledge && npm run build --workspace @semse/agents && npm run build --workspace @semse/autonomy && npm run build --workspace @semse/tools && npm run dev --workspace @semse/api
scripts.dev:api:local-llm: HOST=127.0.0.1 PORT=4132 SEMSE_AUTONOMY_LLM_PROVIDER=ollama SEMSE_AUTONOMY_LLM_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:11434/v1 SEMSE_AUTONOMY_LLM_MODEL=qwen2.5:3b SEMSE_AUTONOMY_LLM_API_KEY=ollama npm run dev:api
scripts.dev:worker: npm run build --workspace @semse/shared && npm run build --workspace @semse/auth && npm run build --workspace @semse/knowledge && npm run build --workspace @semse/agents && npm run build --workspace @semse/autonomy && npm run build --workspace @semse/tools && npm run dev --workspace @semse/worker
scripts.build:web: npm run build --workspace @semse/shared && npm run build --workspace @semse/auth && npm run build --workspace @semse/schemas && npm run build --workspace @semse/knowledge && npm run build --workspace @semse/agents && npm run build --workspace @semse/autonomy && npm run build --workspace @semse/tools && npm run build --workspace @semse/web
scripts.build:api: npm run build --workspace @semse/shared && npm run build --workspace @semse/auth && npm run build --workspace @semse/schemas && npm run build --workspace @semse/knowledge && npm run build --workspace @semse/agents && npm run build --workspace @semse/autonomy && npm run build --workspace @semse/tools && npm run build --workspace @semse/api
scripts.check: npm run test:unit && npm run prisma:generate --workspace @semse/db && npm run build:api && npm run build:web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @semse/api && npm run lint --workspace @semse/web
scripts.verify:workspace: npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit --workspace @semse/api && npm run build:api && npm run build:web
scripts.verify:operacion-asistida:local: npm run verify:operacion-asistida:bcp && npm run drill:operacion-asistida:bcp
scripts.verify:operacion-asistida:api-local: npm run verify:operacion-asistida:bcp && npm run drill:operacion-asistida:api-local

scripts.test:ci: npm run test:coverage && npm run test:e2e
